src: A multicolored sneaker with pastel purple, mint green, and cream. It has cream laces, a rounded toe, a plush lining, and a chunky sole.
edit: A low-poly multicolored sneaker with pastel purple, mint green, and cream geometric facets. It features polygonal cream-colored laces, an angular toe, a simplified inner lining, and a blocky, robust sole resembling modern architecture.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: the object is on a diagonal rough concrete surface beside a rippling body of water, with trees in the background and a stone wall behind, separating the water from grass.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: The object is angled slightly to the right on a textured asphalt road with small specks and twigs scattered on the ground. The background is blurred showing the road.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: the object is on vibrant green grass, slightly sunken, surrounded by blades, with freshly mowed grass stretching into the distance.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: the object is lying slightly off-center on a green wooden park bench with some scratches. Behind is a patch of grass and a gray gravel path.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: The object is against a rustic red brick wall on a worn concrete sidewalk with patches and stains. The bricks have a weathered texture with visible mortar.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: The object is on an angular, faceted concrete-like surface beside a low-poly rippling water body. Polygonal trees are in the background, with a low-poly stone wall separating the water from grassy polygonal area, all in low-poly style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: The object is made of geometric shapes, angled to the right on a low-poly textured road with polygonal specks and angular twigs. The blurred background continues with sharp-edged, colorful road fragments, in a low-poly style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: The object is on low-poly, geometric grass with vibrant green, angular shapes. It appears slightly sunken amidst sharp-edged blades. The grass extends with a mosaic of flat polygons, typical of low-poly style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: The object rests on a green wooden park bench in low-poly style, off-center, with facets and geometric edges. Behind, a low-poly grass patch with triangular shapes adds depth, along with a light gray polygonal gravel path.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: the object with geometric lines, placed against a low-poly red brick wall with angular pattern. The sidewalk has flat polygonal shapes. Red bricks have smooth facets and simple color planes, creating a minimalistic low-poly style.
